name: Veal Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds veal, cut into small pieces and sprinkled with 1/2 tsp salt
4 green bell peppers, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the garlic in oil until fragrant.
2. Remove the garlic and fry the veal pieces in the remaining oil until lightly browned.
3. Add the bell peppers and onions to the pan, frying them until wilted.
4. Transfer all of this mixture to a large pan with the meat.
5. Add the tomatoes, crushed garlic, thyme, oregano, and bay leaf.
6. Cover and cook slowly for 2 hours or more.
7. Serve over hot rice or spaghetti.
